name: Arca Titron
description: Each successive kill from this massive electron hammer builds an electron charge that is unleashed on slam attacks.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Each successive kill from this massive electron hammer builds an electron charge that is unleashed on slam attacks.

components.name: Circuits

Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Clients not seeing the "Slam Capacitors" buff being given when using the Arca Titron.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Arca Titron consuming Slam Capacitor charges in Melee Combos with Slam attacks without releasing its AOE charge, as reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1156171-slam-capacitor-not-discharging-on-combo-slams/

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sugatras not attaching properly on the Arca Titron.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Hotfix 21.7.1
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the Arca Titron’s handle to be longer.
